title: BoardGameGeek Hotness
content:
1. **The Legacy Of Mars**
*2027*
Discover new planets to terraform, and new ways to do it!
![The Legacy Of Mars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-17/toplist/bgg_02084109.jpg)

2. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*2025*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-17/toplist/bgg_042c9db6.png)

3. **First Giants**
*2026*
Dinosaurs, flying reptiles & giant mammals — create the most prestigious exhibition!
![First Giants](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-17/toplist/bgg_ac10eadc.png)

4. **Toy Battle**
*2025*
Send forth an army of toys to conquer territories.
![Toy Battle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-17/toplist/bgg_3300b4fd.jpg)

5. **Lands of Evershade**
*2026*
 Hybrid RPG/board game combines storytelling, tactical combat, and dice-based system.
![Lands of Evershade](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-17/toplist/bgg_77c26481.png)

6. **Terraria: The Board Game**
*2026*
Dig, fight, explore and build in this co-op adventure for 1-4 intrepid Terrarians!
![Terraria: The Board Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-17/toplist/bgg_29c2d9cd.jpg)

7. **Terraforming Mars**
*2016*
Compete with rival CEOs to make Mars habitable and build your corporate empire.
![Terraforming Mars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-17/toplist/bgg_406e5f85.jpg)

8. **Emberleaf**
*2025*
Rally heroes, reclaim the forest, and restore the Emberlings' sacred homeland.
![Emberleaf](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-17/toplist/bgg_3b8ca959.jpg)

9. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*2024*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-17/toplist/bgg_e1837554.jpg)

10. **Dungeons of the Oak Dell**
*2025*
Innovative fighting system, letting you immerse in every hit you deal to a monster!
![Dungeons of the Oak Dell](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-17/toplist/bgg_12028965.jpg)

11. **Habitats**
*2016*
Build a wildlife park - but be sure to give your animals the terrain they need!
![Habitats](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-17/toplist/bgg_7b4eb21c.jpg)

12. **The Old King's Crown**
*2025*
Out-manoeuvre your rivals as you vie for control of an ancient, crumbling kingdom.
![The Old King's Crown](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-17/toplist/bgg_ce695b74.jpg)

13. **Vantage**
*2025*
Explore an entire planet's open world from a first-person perspective.
![Vantage](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-17/toplist/bgg_926b7d27.jpg)

14. **Feya's Swamp**
*2025*
Rise as the most prosperous clan in this magical swamp.
![Feya's Swamp](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-17/toplist/bgg_90226449.png)

15. **Ark Nova**
*2021*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-17/toplist/bgg_03d31dff.jpg)

16. **Magical Athlete**
*2025*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-17/toplist/bgg_8cefe220.png)

17. **Dirt & Dust**
*2025*
Rally in the world of dice and cards.
![Dirt & Dust](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-17/toplist/bgg_7a292735.jpg)

18. **Dragons Down**
*2024*
Explore a fantasy sandbox world inspired by Magic Realm seeking fame and fortune.
![Dragons Down](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-17/toplist/bgg_3f7d270d.jpg)

19. **Eternal Decks**
*2025*
Can you solve each stage before your deck runs out?
![Eternal Decks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-17/toplist/bgg_2187bba2.png)

20. **Nippon: Zaibatsu**
*2026*
Control conglomerates of companies driving Japan’s economy.
![Nippon: Zaibatsu](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-17/toplist/bgg_324fe373.jpg)

21. **Hot Streak**
*2025*
Which mascot will cross the finish line first? Who will be DQ'd?
![Hot Streak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-17/toplist/bgg_623220c7.jpg)

22. **Brass: Birmingham**
*2018*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.
![Brass: Birmingham](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-17/toplist/bgg_4c3c6d20.jpg)

23. **Moon Colony Bloodbath**
*2025*
Whatever can go wrong will go wrong. Players compete to keep their colonists alive.
![Moon Colony Bloodbath](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-17/toplist/bgg_92f147c1.jpg)

24. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*2022*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-17/toplist/bgg_355bbf0f.jpg)

25. **Harmonies**
*2024*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-17/toplist/bgg_cb2f9b82.jpg)
author: boardgamegeek.com

title: BoardGameGeek Bestsellers (Fallback to Plays)
content:
1. **Flip 7**
*16 months on the list*
Score the cards in front of you, or take another card, risking everything you hold?
![Flip 7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-17/toplist/bgg_8b426bb6.jpg)

5. **Wingspan**
*88 months on the list*
Attract a beautiful and diverse collection of birds to your wildlife preserve.

6. **Bomb Busters**
*12 months on the list*
